message.content:
@startuml
title PD parse detail

participant "Chi" as Chi
participant "pipeline" as pipeline
participant "pdlibwrapper" as pdlibwrapper
participant "pdlibinterface" as pdlibinterface
participant "camxsensornode" as camxsensornode
participant "camxpdlibraryhandler" as camxpdlibraryhandler

note right of Chi
ChiPDEntry[] = "ChiPDLibraryEntry"
ChiASDEntry[] = "ChiASDAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAFDEntry[] = "ChiAFDAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAWBEntry[] = "ChiAWBAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAFEntry[] = "ChiAFAlgorithmEntry"
from this text, can get Algorithm Entry
end note

note right of pdlibwrapper
pdlibwrapper
camxpdlibwrapper.cpp
end note

note right of pdlibinterface
pdlibinterface
camxpdlibinterface.cpp
end note

note right of camxsensornode
camxsensornode.cpp
end note

note right of camxpdlibraryhandler
camxpdlibraryhandler.cpp
end note

note left of Chi
chi stats algo
end note

note left of pdlibwrapper
PD lib create
end note

note left of pipeline
ProbeChiComponents
GetAECAlgorithmCallback
GetAFDAlgorithmCallback
GetAFAlgorithmCallback
GetAWBAlgorithmCallback
GetASDAlgorithmCallback
GetPDLibraryCallback
GetHVXAlgorithmCallback
return
These Callback used in camxpipeline.cpp when call pipeline:CreateNodes
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
for m_pStatscallback.pDPCallback
contain these interface
pCallBacks->pfnGetCapabilities = PDWrapperGetCapabilities;
pCallBacks->pfnCreate = CreatePDLibWrapper;
pCallBacks->pfnQueryVendorTag = NULL;
pCallBacks->pfnSetAlgoInterface = PDWrapperSetNodeInterface;
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
CreatePDLibWrapper
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
CamX::LoadPDLib
" %s%s%s%s "
"VendorLibPath"
"PathSeparator"
"pLibName"
"SharedLibraryExtension"
return Addr
pfnCreate
return
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
call PD lib
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
Init PDLib
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
for pipeline create, will create every node
and pdlib is init in sensor node
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
ProcessingNodeFinalizeInitialization
1. ReadEEPROMData
2. GetCSInfo
3. GetOTPData
4. PopulatePDAFInformation
5. PublishPDAFinformation
why we need publish this info?
actually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCv1.1 and BPS PDPCv2.0 will use it.
since type 3 sensor will not do pdpc
end note

note left of camxpdlibraryhandler
LoadPDLibrary
CPDLibHandler::CreateLib
end note

@enduml
